data.title: Willis Lease Finance Amends CEO Compensation Agreement
data.description:
Willis Lease Finance ( (WLFC) ) just unveiled an announcement.

On March 31, 2025, Willis Lease Finance Corporation’s Compensation Committee approved an amendment to the employment agreement with Charles F. Willis IV, canceling a non-qualified stock option for 231,000 shares and altering the vesting schedule for a restricted stock award. This amendment impacts Mr. Willis’s compensation structure, aligning it with the company’s 2023 Incentive Stock Plan, and affects the vesting conditions based on his continued service or termination circumstances.

More about Willis Lease Finance

Willis Lease Finance Corporation operates in the aviation industry, specializing in leasing and financing solutions for commercial aircraft and engines. The company focuses on providing innovative leasing options to airlines and other aviation operators worldwide.

data.title: Renasant Completes Merger with The First Bancshares
data.description:
Renasant ( (RNST) ) has issued an update.

On April 1, 2025, Renasant Corporation completed its merger with The First Bancshares, Inc., with Renasant continuing as the surviving corporation. The merger also involved the integration of The First Bank into Renasant Bank. As a result of the merger, Renasant assumed subordinated debentures and notes totaling $133,786,000 and expanded its board of directors to include members from The First. The transition in leadership will see Kevin D. Chapman assume the role of CEO, while E. Robinson McGraw will resign as an officer but remain Chairman of the Board. The integration of The First’s operations is expected to be completed by early August 2025.

More about Renasant

Renasant Corporation is the parent company of Renasant Bank, a 121-year-old financial services institution with approximately $26 billion in assets. It operates over 280 banking, lending, mortgage, and wealth management offices throughout the Southeast and offers factoring and asset-based lending on a nationwide basis.

YTD Price Performance: -13.57%

Average Trading Volume: 773,718

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $2.91B

data.title: Magnum Goldcorp Settles Debt with Share Issuance
data.description:
An update from Magnum Goldcorp ( (TSE:MGI) ) is now available.

Magnum Goldcorp Inc., a company trading under the symbol TSX-V: MGI, has announced that it has entered into agreements to settle debts amounting to $118,301.49 by issuing 2,366,030 common shares at a value of $0.05 per share. This debt settlement is subject to approval by the TSX Venture Exchange and the shares will have a statutory four-month hold period. This move is likely aimed at improving the company’s financial standing by reducing its debt obligations through equity issuance.

More about Magnum Goldcorp

data.title: Home Bancorp to Release Q1 2025 Earnings Report
data.description:
An update from Home Bancorp ( (HBCP) ) is now available.

Home Bancorp, Inc. announced plans to release its first quarter 2025 earnings on April 21, 2025, followed by a conference call on April 22, 2025, to discuss the results. The earnings release and investor presentation will be available on the company’s website, and stakeholders can access the conference call to hear insights from the company’s leadership.

More about Home Bancorp

Home Bancorp, Inc., a Louisiana corporation, is the holding company for Home Bank, N.A., a federally chartered, community-oriented bank headquartered in Lafayette, Louisiana. Founded in 1908 as Home Building & Loan, it is the oldest financial institution in Lafayette Parish. The bank has expanded its services to South Louisiana, Natchez, Mississippi, and the Greater Houston area, including a Commercial Banking Office in North Houston.

data.title: Astrea S.r.l. Increases Stake in Bifire S.p.A. Through Public Purchase Offer
data.description:
The latest update is out from Bifire S.p.A. ( (IT:FIRE) ).

Astrea S.r.l. has initiated a voluntary total public purchase offer for Bifire S.p.A., a company listed on the Euronext Growth Milan. As part of this offer, Equilybra X S.p.A. and Astrea S.r.l. have acquired additional shares, increasing their collective stake to 87.81% of Bifire’s share capital. This move is part of a strategic effort to consolidate control over Bifire, potentially impacting its market operations and stakeholder interests.

More about Bifire S.p.A.

data.title: Bank of Marin Bancorp Q1 2025 Earnings Call Announcement
data.description:
The latest announcement is out from Bank Of Marin Bancorp ( (BMRC) ).

Bank of Marin Bancorp announced that its President and CEO, Tim Myers, and CFO, Dave Bonaccorso, will discuss the company’s financial results for the first quarter of 2025 in an earnings call on April 28, 2025. The results will be released prior to the call, and investors can access the webcast through the company’s website. This announcement provides stakeholders with an opportunity to gain insights into the company’s financial performance and strategic direction.

More about Bank Of Marin Bancorp

Founded in 1990 and headquartered in Novato, Bank of Marin is a leading business and community bank with assets of $3.7 billion. It provides commercial and personal banking, specialty lending, and wealth management and trust services across Northern California. Known for its legendary customer service and community investment, it operates 27 branches and eight commercial banking offices. The bank is recognized for its corporate philanthropy and is included in the Russell 2000 Small-Cap Index and Nasdaq ABA Community Bank Index.

data.title: ZenaTech Expands Drone Production and Acquires New Assets
data.description:
The latest update is out from ZenaTech, Inc. ( (ZENA) ).

In March 2025, ZenaTech, Inc. announced the expansion of its ZenaDrone team by hiring 35 engineers and technicians to boost its drone production capacity. This strategic move supports the transition from prototype to full-scale production of drones like the ZenaDrone 1000 and IQ series, which are used in various sectors including defense and agriculture. The expansion is expected to enhance ZenaTech’s operational efficiency and market competitiveness. Additionally, ZenaTech has completed the acquisition of Othership Limited, a workplace scheduling software company, and plans to leverage quantum computing to enhance productivity for multinational corporations. The company also signed letters of intent to acquire land survey companies to advance its Drone as a Service strategy, aiming to capture a significant share of the $2.5 billion US drone survey market by 2033.

More about ZenaTech, Inc.

ZenaTech, Inc. is a technology company specializing in AI drones, Drone as a Service (DaaS), enterprise SaaS, and Quantum Computing solutions for mission-critical business applications. Since its inception in 2017, the company has expanded its drone design and manufacturing capabilities through its subsidiary, ZenaDrone, to enhance customer inspection, monitoring, safety, security, compliance, and surveying processes. ZenaTech operates globally with offices in North America, Europe, Taiwan, and the UAE, serving sectors such as law enforcement, health, government, industrial, agriculture, defense, and logistics.

YTD Price Performance: -70.32%

Average Trading Volume: 480,880

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

data.description:
Verano Holdings ( (TSE:VRNO) ) just unveiled an update.

Verano Holdings announced it will release its first quarter 2025 financial results on May 8, 2025, before the market opens. The company will host a conference call and webcast to discuss these results, providing an opportunity for analysts and investors to engage with the company’s leadership. This announcement is significant as it provides stakeholders with insights into the company’s financial health and operational performance, potentially influencing market perceptions and investment decisions.

Verano Holdings Corp. is a leading multi-state cannabis company in the United States, known for its historical revenue, geographic scope, and brand performance. The company operates under the Zen Leaf and MÜV dispensary banners and offers a variety of high-quality cannabis products through its diverse portfolio of brands. Verano’s operations span 13 U.S. states with 15 production facilities and over 1.1 million square feet of cultivation capacity.

data.title: iWallet Unveils Milestone in Next-Gen Product Development
data.description:
iWallet ( (IWAL) ) has issued an update.

On April 3, 2025, iWallet Corporation announced a significant milestone in the development of its next-generation products, the iWallet 2.0 and iPassport, with final production prototypes expected by the end of the second quarter of 2025. These products, crafted from aerospace-grade titanium, feature advanced biometric authentication, Bluetooth tracking, and RFID-blocking technology, marking a leap forward in security-focused accessories for modern lifestyles. The company’s engineering team includes talent from major tech brands, ensuring superior build quality. iWallet plans to launch a new website featuring detailed product showcases and investor resources.

More about iWallet

iWallet Corporation (IWAL) is dedicated to creating premium, security-focused accessories that blend innovative design with advanced technology. The company’s products are engineered to meet the needs of the modern, mobile consumer, offering unparalleled protection and functionality.
